nasb.text: Jesus *said to them, “Fill the waterpots with water.” So they filled them up to the brim.

esv.text: Jesus said to the servants, “Fill the jars with water.” And they filled them up to the brim.

cnv.text: 耶穌吩咐僕人：“把缸都倒滿水！”他們就倒滿了，直到缸口。

ccb.text: 耶稣对仆人说：“把缸倒满水！”他们就往缸里倒水，一直满到缸口。

csbs.text: 耶稣对仆人们说：“把这些缸装满水。”他们就装满了，直到缸沿。
